parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ phase: $json.phase, technique_ids: $('Normalize Alert').first().json.technique_ids, query: `${$('Normalize Alert').first().json.threat_name} ${$json.phase} incident response procedure ${$('Normalize Alert').first().json.technique_ids.join(' ')}`, top_k: 5 }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.2, maxOutputTokens: 2048 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ job_id: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.job_id, threat_name: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.threat_name, technique_ids: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.technique_ids, severity: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.severity, status: 'draft', markdown: $json.markdown, missing_techniques: $('Aggregate Sections').first().json.missing_techniques }) }}
